title: DMC - Progress
description:
The experimental modpack is designed for minecraft DMC server.
(Mostly made for me and my friends)
body:
# A modpack that is primarily intended for the Ukrainian minecraft server DMC! 

This modpack is primarily created and optimized **for the DMC server**! But it does not have any specific features that could prevent players who have nothing to do with the DMC community from using it.

[dmc-minecraft.kyiv.ua](https://discord.gg/ynQURNbHW4)

## What is the purpose and how does this modspack differ from others?

In fact, there are already good modpacks created for RP projects and even an [active modpack for the DMC](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dmc-v). But it is **DMC - Progress** that aims to use the latest and most **experimental mods** to optimize, socialize and create content for Minecraft! The whole point is to use the new features of alpha and beta versions of some mods like [Sodium 6.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) and forks of mods for 1.21 like [NoEmotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/noemotecraft), not forgetting about addons for them to expand their functionality!

## Some warnings and tips

In conclusion, I want to say that the modpack is far from perfect (and even a little clogged with mods that only I use), so don't be afraid to edit the modpack as you wish!
Also, **the modpack doesn't have any predefined settings**, so everyone has to customize everything for themselves! But don't worry, most of the time you don't need to do anything more complicated than customizing the graphics or keybindings (I'm serious, a lot of mods require similar keybindings, so it's better to customize them first!)

![Fluttershy ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d01e7bcc85bd75c6fd938aa234b5280175ad1d0.gif)
